final_response: Drafted two messages: (1) firm but not pushy follow-up to Marcus on the 5-day data extract delay, acknowledging the buffer but pressing for a confirmed revised timeline; (2) belated training assignment notification to Priya with engagement shape, scope (6 power users, mid-May), and request for what she needs to start curriculum planning.
